    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P Q R S T U V X Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addInventoryItem(Inventory) - Method in class team44.project2.service.inventory.InventoryService
    Inserts a new inventory item into the database.
    addMenuItemAndGetId(MenuItem) - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Inserts a new menu item and returns the generated primary key.
    addMenuItemContent(MenuItemContent) - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Links an inventory ingredient to a menu item by inserting a MenuItemContent record.
    addOns() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.CartItem
    Returns the value of the addOns record component.
    addToCart(CartItem) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.OrderingScreenController
    Adds a fully customised CartItem to the current order, updates the ticket list view, and recalculates the running total.
    App - Class in team44.project2
    Main application class that initializes the JavaFX application and sets up the primary stage with the login screen.
    App() - Constructor for class team44.project2.App
     
    authenticate(String, String) - Method in class team44.project2.service.AuthService
    Authenticates an employee based on their email and raw password.
    AuthService - Class in team44.project2.service
    Service class responsible for handling authentication logic, including verifying user credentials against stored data in the database.
    AuthService() - Constructor for class team44.project2.service.AuthService
     

    B

    basePrice() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItem
    Returns the value of the basePrice record component.
    businessDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportResult
    Returns the value of the businessDate record component.

    C

    CartItem - Record Class in team44.project2.model.order
    Immutable record representing a single item in the cashier's in-progress shopping cart, bundling the selected MenuItem with any customisation choices (ice level, sweetness) and chosen add-ons.
    CartItem(MenuItem, String, String, String, List) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.order.CartItem
    Creates an instance of a CartItem record class.
    category() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the category record component.
    category() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItem
    Returns the value of the category record component.
    CategoryItemsController - Class in team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering
    Controller for displaying menu items in a selected category and allowing the cashier to select and customize them before adding to the current order.
    CategoryItemsController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.CategoryItemsController
     
    createRestockOrder(int, int, BigDecimal, LocalDateTime, String) - Method in class team44.project2.service.inventory.RestockOrderService
    Creates a new restock order and persists it to the database.
    currentQuantity() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the currentQuantity record component.
    CurrentStockController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controller for the current-stock screen in the manager dashboard, displaying the real-time inventory levels of all items in a read-only table view.
    CurrentStockController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory.CurrentStockController
     
    Customer - Record Class in team44.project2.model
    Immutable record representing a customer of the cafe, containing personal details, contact information, accumulated reward points, and the date they joined the loyalty programme.
    Customer(int, String, String, String, String, int, LocalDate) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Creates an instance of a Customer record class.
    CustomerCheckInController - Class in team44.project2.controller.cashier
    Controller for the customer check-in dialog where cashiers can look up customers by phone number in order to associate them with the current order and display their accumulated reward points.
    CustomerCheckInController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.cashier.CustomerCheckInController
     
    CustomerCheckInController.CustomerSelectedCallback - Interface in team44.project2.controller.cashier
    Callback interface invoked when a cashier confirms a customer selection.
    customerId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Returns the value of the customerId record component.
    customerId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.Order
    Returns the value of the customerId record component.
    CustomerService - Class in team44.project2.service
    Service class responsible for customer data operations, specifically looking up customers by their phone number so cashiers can associate loyalty accounts with in-progress orders.
    CustomerService() - Constructor for class team44.project2.service.CustomerService
     

    D

    DailySalesSummary - Record Class in team44.project2.model.report
    Immutable record representing a daily sales summary, capturing the calendar date, total revenue, and total quantity of items sold for that day.
    DailySalesSummary(LocalDate, BigDecimal, Integer) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.report.DailySalesSummary
    Creates an instance of a DailySalesSummary record class.
    date() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.PaymentMethodSummary
    Returns the value of the date record component.
    deleteInventoryItem(int) - Method in class team44.project2.service.inventory.InventoryService
    Permanently deletes the inventory item identified by the given ID.
    deleteMenuItem(int) - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Permanently removes the menu item with the given ID.
    discounts() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportTotals
    Returns the value of the discounts record component.

    E

    email() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Returns the value of the email record component.
    email() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the email record component.
    Employee - Record Class in team44.project2.model
    Immutable record representing a cafe employee, containing personal details, job role, start date, email address, a salted+hashed password, and whether the account is currently active.
    Employee(int, String, String, String, LocalDate, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Creates an instance of a Employee record class.
    EmployeeAware - Interface in team44.project2.controller
    Interface for JavaFX controllers that need to receive the currently logged-in employee's ID after screen navigation.
    EmployeeFormController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
    Controller for the employee form used by managers to create new employees or edit existing employee records including name, role, start date, email, password, and active status.
    EmployeeFormController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.employees.EmployeeFormController
     
    employeeId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the employeeId record component.
    employeeId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.Order
    Returns the value of the employeeId record component.
    employeeId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.RestockOrder
    Returns the value of the employeeId record component.
    EmployeeListController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
    Controller for the employee list screen in the manager dashboard, displaying all employees in a table and allowing managers to add, edit, and delete employee records.
    EmployeeListController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.employees.EmployeeListController
     
    equals(Object) - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    F

    FIFTY - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.SweetnessLevel
     
    findByPhone(String) - Method in class team44.project2.service.CustomerService
    Looks up a customer by their phone number.
    firstName() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Returns the value of the firstName record component.
    firstName() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the firstName record component.

    G

    getAddOns() - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Returns all available add-on items (items with category 'topping').
    getAllInventory() - Method in class team44.project2.service.inventory.InventoryService
    Fetches all inventory items from the database, ordered alphabetically by item name.
    getAllInventoryNames() - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Returns the names of all inventory items, ordered alphabetically, for use in ingredient-row combo boxes.
    getAllMenuItems() - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Returns every available (non-topping) menu item regardless of category.
    getAllOrders() - Method in class team44.project2.service.inventory.RestockOrderService
    Returns all restock orders from the database, ordered by descending order date.
    getCategories() - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Returns all distinct non-topping menu categories available in the database.
    getDailySalesSummary(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Returns a per-day sales summary (total revenue and total quantity) for each date in the given range.
    getHourlyPaymentSummary(int) - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Returns the payment-method breakdown for all orders placed during the given hour of today's business date.
    getInventoryUsage(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Returns inventory usage data (item name and quantity consumed) aggregated by day for the given date range.
    getItemsByCategory(String) - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Returns all available menu items belonging to the given category.
    getOrAddInventoryItem(String, String, BigDecimal, String, BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Returns the ID of an existing inventory item with the given name, or inserts a new one if no match is found.
    getProductSales(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Returns product-level sales data for each day in the given date range.
    getSalesByCategory(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Returns product-level sales data grouped by category (instead of individual item name) for each day in the given range.
    getSizesForItem(int) - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Returns the distinct size options for the menu item identified by menuItemId.
    grossSales() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportTotals
    Returns the value of the grossSales record component.

    hasZRunToday() - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Checks whether the Z-report has already been generated for today's business date.
    hour() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.PaymentMethodSummary
    Returns the value of the hour record component.
    HUNDRED - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.SweetnessLevel
     

    I

    iceLevel() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.CartItem
    Returns the value of the iceLevel record component.
    iceLevel() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Returns the value of the iceLevel record component.
    IceLevel - Enum Class in team44.project2.model.menu.enums
    Enumeration of ice-level options available for customisable menu items, each paired with a user-friendly label shown in the ordering UI.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.CategoryItemsController
    Initializes the category label, populates the list view with available menu items for the selected category, and registers a double-click handler to open the item-customization screen.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.ItemCustomizationController
    Initialises the customization screen with size, sweetness, ice-level, and add-on options derived from the selected menu item.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.OrderingScreenController
    Initialises the ordering screen by loading the available menu categories.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.PaymentScreenController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.employees.EmployeeFormController
    JavaFX lifecycle hook called after FXML injection — currently a no-op but kept for future initialisation needs.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.employees.EmployeeListController
    Configures table column value factories, loads the employee list, and registers a double-click listener to open the edit form.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory.CurrentStockController
    Configures table column value factories and populates the table with all current inventory items retrieved from the service.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory.InventoryRefillOrderController
    Configures table column value factories, loads all items with stock below the reorder threshold, and sets the table selection mode to single-select.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory.TakeInventoryController
    Configures table column value factories, loads all inventory items into the table and the combo box, and sets a custom cell factory to display item names in the combo box.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.menu.MenuViewController
    Configures table column value factories and loads all available menu items.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.reports.OrderingTrendsController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.reports.SalesReportController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.reports.XReportController
    Registers the back-button action and attaches the hour-input handler to the enter button.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.reports.ZReportController
    Wires the back-button action and the generate-Z-report button action.
    Inventory - Record Class in team44.project2.model
    Immutable record representing a single inventory item in the cafe's inventory management system, including current quantity, reorder threshold, unit of measurement, supplier cost, and the date it was last restocked.
    Inventory(int, String, String, BigDecimal, String, BigDecimal, BigDecimal, LocalDate) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Creates an instance of a Inventory record class.
    inventoryId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the inventoryId record component.
    inventoryId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItemContent
    Returns the value of the inventoryId record component.
    inventoryId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.RestockOrder
    Returns the value of the inventoryId record component.
    InventoryRefillOrderController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controller for the inventory refill-order screen in the manager dashboard, allowing managers to view items whose stock is below the reorder threshold and submit restock orders for individual items.
    InventoryRefillOrderController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory.InventoryRefillOrderController
     
    InventoryService - Class in team44.project2.service.inventory
    Service class responsible for CRUD operations on inventory items, including fetching current stock levels, updating quantities, adding new items, and deleting items that are no longer carried.
    InventoryService() - Constructor for class team44.project2.service.inventory.InventoryService
     
    InventoryUsageData - Record Class in team44.project2.model.report
    Immutable record representing the usage of a single inventory item on a specific date, used for the inventory-usage report to help management track consumption rates.
    InventoryUsageData(LocalDate, String, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.report.InventoryUsageData
    Creates an instance of a InventoryUsageData record class.
    isActive() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the isActive record component.
    isAvailable() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItem
    Returns the value of the isAvailable record component.
    item() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.CartItem
    Returns the value of the item record component.
    ItemCustomizationController - Class in team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering
    Controller for the item-customization screen where cashiers select size, sweetness level, ice level, and add-ons for a specific menu item before adding it to the cart.
    ItemCustomizationController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.ItemCustomizationController
     
    itemName() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the itemName record component.
    itemName() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.InventoryUsageData
    Returns the value of the itemName record component.
    itemPrice() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Returns the value of the itemPrice record component.

    J

    joinDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Returns the value of the joinDate record component.

    L

    label() - Method in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.IceLevel
    Returns the user-friendly display label for this ice level.
    label() - Method in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.SweetnessLevel
    Returns the user-friendly display label for this sweetness level.
    lastName() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Returns the value of the lastName record component.
    lastName() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the lastName record component.
    lastRestockDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the lastRestockDate record component.
    LESS_ICE - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.IceLevel
     
    LoginController - Class in team44.project2.controller.auth
    Controller for the login screen that authenticates users and navigates them to the appropriate dashboard screen based on their assigned role.
    LoginController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.auth.LoginController
     

    M

    ManagerDashboardController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager
    Controller for the main manager dashboard screen, providing navigation buttons to employee management, menu/pricing, reports, and inventory management sub-screens.
    ManagerDashboardController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.ManagerDashboardController
     
    MenuItem - Record Class in team44.project2.model.menu
    Immutable record representing a single item on the cafe's menu, including its name, category, available size, base price, and whether it is currently offered to customers.
    MenuItem(int, String, String, String, BigDecimal, boolean) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItem
    Creates an instance of a MenuItem record class.
    MenuItemContent - Record Class in team44.project2.model.menu
    Immutable record representing the link between a menu item and an inventory ingredient, specifying how much of that ingredient is consumed each time the menu item is ordered.
    MenuItemContent(int, int, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItemContent
    Creates an instance of a MenuItemContent record class.
    MenuItemFormController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.menu
    Controller for the menu-item form dialog used by managers to add new menu items or edit existing ones, including name, category, size, price, availability, and the associated inventory ingredient requirements.
    MenuItemFormController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.menu.MenuItemFormController
     
    menuItemId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItem
    Returns the value of the menuItemId record component.
    menuItemId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItemContent
    Returns the value of the menuItemId record component.
    menuItemId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Returns the value of the menuItemId record component.
    MenuService - Class in team44.project2.service
    Service class responsible for all menu-item database operations, including fetching categories, items by category, available sizes, add-ons, and performing create, update, and delete operations on menu items and their inventory ingredient links.
    MenuService() - Constructor for class team44.project2.service.MenuService
     
    MenuViewController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.menu
    Controller for the menu-view screen in the manager dashboard, displaying all available menu items in a table and allowing managers to add, edit, and delete items.
    MenuViewController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.menu.MenuViewController
     

    N

    name() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItem
    Returns the value of the name record component.
    NO_ICE - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.IceLevel
     

    O

    onCustomerSelected(Customer) - Method in interface team44.project2.controller.cashier.CustomerCheckInController.CustomerSelectedCallback
    Called with the customer that the cashier confirmed.
    ONE_TWENTY - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.SweetnessLevel
     
    Order - Record Class in team44.project2.model.order
    Immutable record representing a completed order, containing the IDs of the employee who processed it and the optional loyalty customer, together with the order timestamp, total price, tip, and payment method used.
    Order(int, int, Integer, LocalDateTime, BigDecimal, BigDecimal, String) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.order.Order
    Creates an instance of a Order record class.
    orderCount() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.PaymentMethodSummary
    Returns the value of the orderCount record component.
    orderDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.RestockOrder
    Returns the value of the orderDate record component.
    orderId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.Order
    Returns the value of the orderId record component.
    orderId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Returns the value of the orderId record component.
    OrderingScreenController - Class in team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering
    Controller for the main ordering screen used by cashiers to create and manage customer orders, including browsing menu categories, customizing items, initiating customer check-in, and processing payments.
    OrderingScreenController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.OrderingScreenController
     
    OrderingTrendsController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
    Controller for the ordering-trends report screen in the manager dashboard, displaying line charts for product sales and dollar sales over a manager-selected date range, with optional log-scale Y-axis and navigation to other report screens.
    OrderingTrendsController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.reports.OrderingTrendsController
     
    OrderItem - Record Class in team44.project2.model.order
    Immutable record representing a single line item within an order, linking to the ordered menu item, optional parent item (for add-ons), customisation options (ice and sugar level), quantity, and the price charged at the time of the order.
    OrderItem(int, int, int, Integer, int, String, String, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Creates an instance of a OrderItem record class.
    orderItemId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Returns the value of the orderItemId record component.
    OrderService - Class in team44.project2.service
    Service class responsible for order submission, coordinating the persistence of the order header, its individual line items, and the corresponding inventory decrements all within a single database transaction.
    OrderService() - Constructor for class team44.project2.service.OrderService
     

    P

    parentItemId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Returns the value of the parentItemId record component.
    passwordHash() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the passwordHash record component.
    paymentBreakdown() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportResult
    Returns the value of the paymentBreakdown record component.
    paymentMethod() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.Order
    Returns the value of the paymentMethod record component.
    paymentMethod() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.PaymentMethodSummary
    Returns the value of the paymentMethod record component.
    PaymentMethodSummary - Record Class in team44.project2.model.report
    Simple data holder for the X‑report: number of orders and total sales grouped by payment method for a given hour/day.
    PaymentMethodSummary(LocalDate, int, String, int, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.report.PaymentMethodSummary
    Creates an instance of a PaymentMethodSummary record class.
    PaymentScreenController - Class in team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment
    Controller for the payment screen where cashiers select a payment method, optionally add a tip, confirm the order total, and then submit the order to the backend for processing.
    PaymentScreenController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.PaymentScreenController
     
    phone() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Returns the value of the phone record component.
    productName() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ProductSalesData
    Returns the value of the productName record component.
    ProductSalesData - Record Class in team44.project2.model.report
    Immutable record representing the aggregated sales data for a single product on a given date, capturing the quantity sold and total revenue generated.
    ProductSalesData(LocalDate, String, Integer, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.report.ProductSalesData
    Creates an instance of a ProductSalesData record class.

    Q

    Returns the value of the quantity record component.

    Returns the value of the quantity record component.

    Returns the value of the quantity record component.

    R

    REGULAR_ICE - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.IceLevel
     
    reorderThreshold() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the reorderThreshold record component.
    ReportService - Class in team44.project2.service
    Service class responsible for generating all management reports: daily sales summaries, product-level sales breakdowns, sales by category, inventory usage, X-report hourly payment summaries, and the end-of-day Z-report with reset logic.
    ReportService() - Constructor for class team44.project2.service.ReportService
     
    restockId() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.RestockOrder
    Returns the value of the restockId record component.
    RestockOrder - Record Class in team44.project2.model
    Immutable record representing a restock order placed by an employee to replenish a low-stock inventory item, tracking the quantity ordered, order timestamp, and current fulfilment status.
    RestockOrder(int, int, int, BigDecimal, LocalDateTime, String) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.RestockOrder
    Creates an instance of a RestockOrder record class.
    RestockOrderService - Class in team44.project2.service.inventory
    Service class responsible for managing restock orders, providing methods to create new orders when inventory runs low and retrieve the full order history.
    RestockOrderService() - Constructor for class team44.project2.service.inventory.RestockOrderService
     
    rewardPoints() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Customer
    Returns the value of the rewardPoints record component.
    role() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the role record component.
    runZReport(String) - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Generates the end-of-day Z-report for the current business date.

    S

    saleDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.DailySalesSummary
    Returns the value of the saleDate record component.
    saleDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ProductSalesData
    Returns the value of the saleDate record component.
    SalesReportController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
    Controller for the sales-report screen in the manager dashboard, showing aggregated sales data (quantity sold and revenue) per menu item over a date range selected by the manager.
    SalesReportController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.reports.SalesReportController
     
    serviceCharges() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportTotals
    Returns the value of the serviceCharges record component.
    setCallback(CustomerCheckInController.CustomerSelectedCallback) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.CustomerCheckInController
    Registers the callback that will be invoked when a customer is successfully confirmed by the cashier.
    setCategory(String) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.CategoryItemsController
    Sets the menu category whose items this controller will display.
    setEditingItem(MenuItem) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.menu.MenuItemFormController
    Pre-populates the form fields with an existing menu item's data for editing.
    setEmployee(Employee) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.manager.employees.EmployeeFormController
    Pre-populates the form fields with the data of an existing employee for editing.
    setEmployeeId(int) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.OrderingScreenController
    Stores the ID of the currently logged-in employee for use when submitting orders.
    setEmployeeId(int) - Method in interface team44.project2.controller.EmployeeAware
    Receives the ID of the employee who is currently authenticated.
    setMenuItem(MenuItem) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.ItemCustomizationController
    Sets the menu item whose customization options will be displayed.
    setOnNewSale(Runnable) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.PaymentScreenController
    Registers a callback to be invoked when the transaction is complete and the cashier is ready to start a new sale.
    setOnNewSale(Runnable) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.TransactionCompleteController
    Registers a callback that is invoked when the cashier starts a new sale from this screen.
    setOrderData(int, Customer, List) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.PaymentScreenController
    Receives all data needed to process the order.
    setOrderData(Order, BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.TransactionCompleteController
    Sets the order data required to display the subtotal, tip, and grand total on the transaction-complete screen.
    setOrderingScreenController(OrderingScreenController) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.CategoryItemsController
    Provides a reference to the parent OrderingScreenController so that confirmed cart items can be passed back.
    setOrderingScreenController(OrderingScreenController) - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering.ItemCustomizationController
    Provides a reference to the parent OrderingScreenController so that the completed CartItem can be passed back after the cashier confirms.
    showPaymentMethods() - Method in class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.PaymentScreenController
    Shows the payment-method selection panel with buttons for each available method.
    signedEmployeeIds() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportResult
    Returns the value of the signedEmployeeIds record component.
    signZReportToday(int) - Method in class team44.project2.service.ReportService
    Records an employee's signature against today's Z-report closeout.
    size() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.menu.MenuItem
    Returns the value of the size record component.
    size() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.CartItem
    Returns the value of the size record component.
    startDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Employee
    Returns the value of the startDate record component.
    status() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.RestockOrder
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    StringUtils - Class in team44.project2.util
    Utility class providing common string-manipulation helpers used throughout the application.
    submitOrder(int, Integer, String, BigDecimal, List) - Method in class team44.project2.service.OrderService
    Submits an order to the database within a single transaction.
    sugarLevel() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.OrderItem
    Returns the value of the sugarLevel record component.
    supplierCost() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the supplierCost record component.
    sweetness() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.CartItem
    Returns the value of the sweetness record component.
    SweetnessLevel - Enum Class in team44.project2.model.menu.enums
    Enumeration of sweetness-level options available for customisable menu items, each paired with a user-friendly percentage label shown in the ordering UI.

    T

    TakeInventoryController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controller for the take-inventory screen in the manager dashboard, allowing managers to update stock quantities for existing inventory items, add entirely new items via a dialog, and delete items they no longer carry.
    TakeInventoryController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory.TakeInventoryController
     
    tax() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportTotals
    Returns the value of the tax record component.
    team44.project2 - package team44.project2
    Root package for the Project 2 point-of-sale application built by Team 44.
    team44.project2.controller - package team44.project2.controller
    Top-level controller package containing shared interfaces used across all role-specific controller sub-packages.
    team44.project2.controller.auth - package team44.project2.controller.auth
    Controllers responsible for the authentication flow of the application.
    team44.project2.controller.cashier - package team44.project2.controller.cashier
    Controllers for the cashier-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
    team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering - package team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering
    Controllers that manage the item-ordering workflow for cashiers.
    team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment - package team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment
    Controllers that manage the payment workflow after a cashier finalises a cart.
    team44.project2.controller.manager - package team44.project2.controller.manager
    Controllers for the manager-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.employees - package team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
    Controllers for the employee-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory - package team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controllers for the inventory-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.menu - package team44.project2.controller.manager.menu
    Controllers for the menu-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.reports - package team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
    Controllers for the reporting screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.model - package team44.project2.model
    Domain model package containing Java records and classes that represent the core business entities of the point-of-sale system.
    team44.project2.model.menu - package team44.project2.model.menu
    Model classes representing menu-related entities.
    team44.project2.model.menu.enums - package team44.project2.model.menu.enums
    Enumerations for the customisation options available when ordering a menu item.
    team44.project2.model.order - package team44.project2.model.order
    Model classes representing an order and its constituent parts.
    team44.project2.model.report - package team44.project2.model.report
    Model classes that carry aggregated reporting data returned by ReportService.
    team44.project2.service - package team44.project2.service
    Application-scoped service classes that encapsulate the business logic and direct database access for the point-of-sale system.
    team44.project2.service.inventory - package team44.project2.service.inventory
    Service classes for inventory management operations.
    team44.project2.util - package team44.project2.util
    General-purpose utility classes shared across all layers of the application.
    TEN - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.SweetnessLevel
     
    THIRTY - Enum constant in enum class team44.project2.model.menu.enums.SweetnessLevel

    totalPrice() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.order.CartItem
    Computes the total price of this cart item as the sum of the base menu-item price and the prices of all selected add-ons.

    Returns the value of the totalPrice record component.

    Returns the value of the totalPrice record component.

    Returns the value of the totalSales record component.
    toTitleCase(String) - Static method in class team44.project2.util.StringUtils
    Converts a string to title case by upper-casing the first character and lower-casing the rest.
    TransactionCompleteController - Class in team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment
    Controller for the transaction-complete screen shown after a successful order submission, allowing cashiers to print or email a receipt or immediately start a new sale.
    TransactionCompleteController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment.TransactionCompleteController
     

    U

    unit() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.Inventory
    Returns the value of the unit record component.
    updateMenuItem(MenuItem) - Method in class team44.project2.service.MenuService
    Persists changes to an existing menu item's name, category, size, price, and availability.
    updateStock(int, BigDecimal) - Method in class team44.project2.service.inventory.InventoryService
    Sets the current stock quantity of the specified inventory item and updates the last_restock_date to today.
    usageDate() - Method in record class team44.project2.model.report.InventoryUsageData
    Returns the value of the usageDate record component.

    ZReportController - Class in team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
    Controller for the Z-report screen in the manager dashboard.
    ZReportController() - Constructor for class team44.project2.controller.manager.reports.ZReportController
     
    ZReportResult - Record Class in team44.project2.model.report
    Immutable record representing the full result of a Z-report run, including the business date, aggregate totals, per-payment-method breakdown, and the list of employee IDs who signed off on the closeout.
    ZReportResult(LocalDate, ZReportTotals, List, List) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportResult
    Creates an instance of a ZReportResult record class.
    ZReportTotals - Record Class in team44.project2.model.report
    Immutable record holding the monetary totals captured during a Z-report run.
    ZReportTotals(BigDecimal, BigDecimal, BigDecimal, BigDecimal, BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class team44.project2.model.report.ZReportTotals
    Creates an instance of a ZReportTotals record class.
